cluster_scoped_interpretation: The 225 cluster-scoped findings are R-rule defensive-pattern findings (R1=dict.get, R2=getattr, R5=isinstance, R6=silent-except). They are NOT layer-import violations. They appear here only because the allowlist YAML keys are full-path prefixed against the whole src/elspeth tree; --root src/elspeth/contracts breaks the prefix match and re-surfaces already-allowlisted entries. The whole-tree check ran clean (exit 0), confirming both the layer-import L0 invariant and the R-rule allowlisting are in place. Mirrors the engine cluster pass's framing.
